args:
set -e

tar xf /deps/source/source -C /tmp
cd /tmp/ncurses-6.6

CC=/deps/seed/bin/gcc \
AR=/deps/seed/bin/ar \
RANLIB=/deps/seed/bin/ranlib \
CFLAGS="-O2" \
LDFLAGS="-static" \
sh ./configure \
  --prefix=/ \
  --disable-shared \
  --enable-static \
  --enable-widec \
  --without-debug \
  --without-ada \
  --without-manpages \
  --without-tests \
  --without-cxx-binding \
  --disable-stripping

make -j$(nproc)
make install DESTDIR=$OUT

# Create non-widec compatibility symlinks so cbonsai's Makefile can find -lncurses
cd $OUT/lib
for f in libncursesw*; do
  ln -sf "$f" "$(echo "$f" | sed 's/w//')"
done
cd $OUT/lib/pkgconfig
for f in *.pc; do
  ln -sf "$f" "$(echo "$f" | sed 's/w//')"
done
